notes: All OK, instead of zooming, but you can zoom out\in like this -> esc - alt+tab - return into game - esc and zoom out. Repeat as many times as you want.
title: Heroes of Might & Magic V: Tribes of the East

notes: By default the game won't start, however after modifying proton profile and forcing it to run in virtual desktop it runs fine, but there is no sound.
title: Heroes of Might & Magic V: Tribes of the East

notes: Starts without problems, all ok. running on my system with min settings
title: Heroes of Might & Magic V: Tribes of the East

notes:
Using "PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%" the FPS in the menus gets fixed.

The FPS in game however is still terrible. I've tried all of the ProtonDB options, and none are able to fix that. Looking for other fixes. Will update.
title: Heroes of Might & Magic V: Tribes of the East

notes: First of all the game needs to run in wine virtual desktop because there are windowing issues otherwise, secondly I could only get the sound to work after setting shm-size-bytes in the /etc/pulse/daemon.conf and /etc/pulse/client.conf to 4194304 bytes (16 megs and more seems to cause issues). This tweak is needed only for HOMM5 on my system, audio works fine for everything else. And lastly zoom out using the mouse wheel is broken (you can zoom in, but not zoom out), to get around this you can use PgUp and PgDn keys on the keyboard to zoom in and out. Hope this helps :)
title: Heroes of Might & Magic V: Tribes of the East

notes:
Here are my launch parameters: "PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%".

Game launched successfully, but the cursor stuck within an invisible borders and I could not select any menu item. The solution was to change cursor type to hw.
Config file located here: /SteamLibrary/steamapps/compatdata/15370/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/My Games/Heroes of Might and Magic V - Tribes of the East/Profiles/<USERNAME>/user_a2.cfg
Need to change setvar ui_use_hwcursor from 0 to 1.

Zoom in/out works perfectly with PgUp and PgDn.

First, when the map was loaded I experienced perfomance issues, but changing graphics settings from Very High to Normal and applying the problem's gone away.
After applying these changes you can safely set Very High graphics settings back.
title: Heroes of Might & Magic V: Tribes of the East

notes: Main menu on max anti-aliasing halved my fps. FPS would often go down to 1 inside the game world. Anything can trigger it, from spell particle to getting to battle mode. Alt-tabbing usually fix it for me and the fps go back to normal. Sometimes crash when getting back into the game after alt-tabbing.
title: Heroes of Might & Magic V: Tribes of the East

notes: Most issues are gone once you enable d9vk. Occasional stutter here and there but nothing drastic since this is mostly strategy game.
title: Heroes of Might & Magic V: Tribes of the East

notes: Played some custom games on randomly generated maps, everything works fine on very high graphics and full-screen mode. No issues when tabbing either.
title: Heroes of Might & Magic V: Tribes of the East
